diagrams.title: Green IT Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows the complete lifecycle of IT equipment from manufacturing to disposal with Green IT interventions at each stage
diagrams.purpose: Understand where Green IT practices can be applied throughout IT equipment lifecycle

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Power Usage Effectiveness calculation showing energy flow in a data center
diagrams.purpose: Understand how PUE measures data center efficiency and identify areas for improvement

diagrams.title: Virtualization Concept
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how multiple virtual machines run on a single physical server
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how virtualization improves resource utilization and reduces hardware requirements

diagrams.title: Hot Aisle/Cold Aisle Containment
diagrams.description: Server room layout showing hot and cold air flow management for efficient cooling
diagrams.purpose: Understand cooling optimization techniques in data centers
